properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v8 v9 v3 v10 v11 v12 v13 v3 v3 v14

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I don't want anything but You You're more than every dream come true All of the things I thought I wanted Don't come close to knowing You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Now that I'm Yours and You are mine Our love is the secret that I find I'll spend forever in the pleasure I found looking in Your eyes

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Give me Jesus Give me Jesus You can have all this world You can have all this world

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: More than silver, more than gold You are the treasure that I hold Now that I've tasted of Your goodness Nothing else will satisfy

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Just give me Jesus Give me Jesus And you can have all this world You can have all this world

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Give me Jesus Give me Jesus And you can have all this world

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Just give me Jesus I only want Jesus I only want Jesus I only want Jesus

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I don't want anyone else I don't need anything else You are my one thing You are my one thing

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Just give me Jesus Give me Jesus You can have all this world You can have all this world

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Oh, and I don't want anyone else And I don't need anything else 'Cause You are my one thing You are my one thing I don't want anyone else And I don't need anything else 'Cause You are my one thing You are my one thing

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Oh, I don't want anyone else And I don't need anything else 'Cause You are my one thing You are my one thing I don't want anyone else And I don't need anything else

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: You are my one thing You are my one thing You are my one thing Oh, You are my one thing You are my one thing You are my one thing

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: Oh, You are my one thing You are my one thing You are my one thing Yeah, You are my one thing You are my one thing You are my one thing 'Cause You are my one thing You are my one thing

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: You can have all this world
